text: There is an overwhelming sense of emptiness and anticipation in this space. The deserted room with scattered bean bags and vast, clean surfaces echoes a sterile tranquility. I feel as though I am waiting for something to happen, for people to arrive and fill the silence. The bright lights and minimalist design almost emphasize my own solitude, and I become aware of my own presence, feeling both calm and slightly disoriented in the angled, open environment.
